about.heading:
Finding your Rightful Path,
an elegant stroke of harmony
about.description: Inspired by the pristine path of a fairway, Fairways Villa is a refined sanctuary where chaos fades and clarity begins. As a premier villa turkey rental, we offer more than a luxurious stay—it is a transition into absolute peace. Crafted with meticulous precision amidst natural serenity, our luxury rental features a private pool and views of the golf course, making it the perfect holiday home. Whether you are here for a family getaway or a golf trip, this private pool villa provides the comfort you need. Located in Belek, Antalya, it is perfectly suited for those seeking a luxury rental experience in a scenic coastal region. Discover the perfect villa turkey holiday, restore your balance, and let us welcome you to your beautiful journey home.
about.address: Kadriye, 07525 Serik/Antalya, Turkey, V29H+7H Serik, Antalya, Turkey

gallery.title: a closer look
gallery.description: Discover the design, textures, and moments that make the villa truly special.

neighbourhood.title: The Neighbourhood
neighbourhood.description: Ideally located in a peaceful yet strategic setting, the villa offers easy access to top attractions, dining spots, and leisure destinations—allowing you to enjoy both privacy and convenience throughout your stay.

attractionsList.name: The Land of Legends Theme Park

leftFaqItems.question: How many guests can sleep at Fairways villa?
leftFaqItems.answer: Fairways villa can comfortably accommodate up to 6 guests, making it perfect for family vacations or small groups.

leftFaqItems.question: Is there a private pool available to guests staying at Fairways villa?
leftFaqItems.answer: Yes, guests can enjoy a fully private outdoor swimming pool, complete with sun loungers and a garden view, ensuring absolute privacy.

leftFaqItems.question: Does Fairways villa have a pool?
leftFaqItems.answer: Yes, the villa features a private pool with a view, which is recently renovated and maintained to the highest standards.

leftFaqItems.question: Does Fairways villa have a balcony?
leftFaqItems.answer: Yes, the villa features a balcony that offers beautiful views of the pool and the surrounding landscaped garden.

leftFaqItems.question: Does Fairways villa have a terrace?
leftFaqItems.answer: Yes, there is a spacious outdoor terrace/patio equipped with seating, ideal for dining al fresco or relaxing in the evening.

rightFaqItems.question: What are the check-in and check-out times at Fairways villa?
rightFaqItems.answer: Check-in at Fairways villa is from 12:00 PM onwards, and check-out is required by 10:00 AM. Dynamic check-in/out can be requested depending on availability.

rightFaqItems.question: How many bedrooms does Fairways villa have?
rightFaqItems.answer: Fairways villa has 3 elegantly furnished bedrooms, designed for maximum comfort and relaxation.

rightFaqItems.question: How much does it cost to stay at Fairways villa?
rightFaqItems.answer: The cost of staying at Fairways villa varies depending on your dates, length of stay, and hotel policies. Please enter your preferred dates to view exact prices.

rightFaqItems.question: What is there to do at Fairways villa?
rightFaqItems.answer: Guests can swim in the private pool, relax in the garden or shared lounge, or explore world-class golf courses and Kadriye Public Beach nearby.

rightFaqItems.question: How far is Fairways villa from the centre of Belek?
rightFaqItems.answer: Fairways villa is 2.6 km from the centre of Belek.

villaDetail.overviewText: Fairways Villa Belek offers a spacious, recently renovated retreat with three bedrooms and two bathrooms. As a top-rated villa turkey option, our property features a comfortable living room, private check-in and check-out services, a 24-hour front desk, and a stunning private pool. This luxury rental is located in the Belek region of Antalya, Turkey, near world-class golf courses. It is designed to be your perfect holiday sanctuary, combining privacy, modern amenities, and outstanding hospitality in a beautiful coastal region.
